data.content: Implemented hierarchical queue label tightening by stripping the project prefix only for dotted aliases in displayBeatLabel(). Added coverage for dotted aliases and unchanged human-friendly aliases. Validation in worktree /Users/cartine/foolery-c4cc: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: codex/foolery-c4cc. Commit: ba7207797280.
